{{Infobox character
| name = Tyria
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Soulbound power, golden vines made of light, thorny ropes of shining gold}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|, golden thorns}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Champion]]}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

''See also: [[Tyria Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Tyria is a [[Champion]] characterized by an unconventional personality, as she lacks the typical drive for combat, shows minimal devotion to the [[Empire]], and frequently avoids carrying weapons. Despite this casual demeanor, she possesses [[Soulbound powers]] that manifest as golden light and luminous, thorny vines which she can use to ensnare or cocoon her targets. In combat, she utilizes a silver needle-like weapon roughly the length of her arm and wears flexible armor composed of mail and leather. She is noted for being particularly effective at capturing opponents, though she has demonstrated the ability to engage in intense battles that can cause significant structural damage. While she was previously known for remaining within her quarters in the [[Imperial Palace]], she has since been seen actively pursuing targets and utilizing her light-based abilities in more direct confrontations.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|As a [[Champion]] clad in leather and mail, Tyria emerged from the fog by stumbling onto the [[Steward]]'s body. She wielded a silver needle as a weapon and utilized her [[Soulbound]] power, which manifested as golden light pooling at her feet and forming vines of radiance. During combat, she cast thorny ropes of shining gold toward [[Shera]] to capture her enemy. Following these events, Tyria carried a red-haired man in white armor who suffered a wound on his back, though she believed [[Calder]] was dead. While leveling her needle at [[Foster]]'s chest, she remained a figure whom researchers would report to [[Petal]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tyria]] is a [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tyria]] is a [[Champion]] who wears armor of leather and mail.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tyria]] is a [[Champion]] with [[Soulbound]] power suited to capturing enemies.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tyria]] uses a silver needle as a weapon.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tyria]]'s [[Soulbound]] power manifests as gold power pooling around her feet and golden vines made of light.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tyria]] used her [[Soulbound powers]] to cast thorny ropes of shining gold toward [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tyria]] stumbled out of the fog onto the [[Steward]]'s body.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tyria]] carries a person in white armor and red hair with a wound on his back.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tyria]] believes [[Calder]] is dead.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tyria]] is someone the researchers would report [[Petal]] to.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tyria]] leveled a silver needle at [[Foster]]'s chest.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Tyria]] uses golden thorns.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Tyria]] has [[Soulbound powers]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“You think I didn’t take his pulse? He’s gone.”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
